privileged_info_summary: The task scales an image from 800x600 pixels (sourced from Unsplash URLs or synthetic fallback via ImageMagick) to exactly 600x400 pixels using GIMP's Scale Image function. The verifier checks four criteria: (1) exact 600x400 pixel dimensions, (2) dimensions changed from original, (3) scaling factors reasonable (0.1-10.0), and (4) content preserved. A minimum 75% score (3/4 criteria) is required to pass. The primary data source is Unsplash (real images); a synthetic fallback exists if downloads fail. Export creates 'scaled_image.jpg' on the user's Desktop.
